query:
DELETE p1 FROM performers p1
INNER JOIN performers p2 
WHERE p1.name = p2.name 
AND p1.id < p2.id;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zFHT5FCru9ok1xS.cec69d91c8c2 --database dWUnvuCqdxwX7Y3rW9HJ6z --execute DELETE p1 FROM performers p1
INNER JOIN performers p2 
WHERE p1.name = p2.name 
AND p1.id < p2.id;
